label: WordPress Contact Import
summary: Starter local-first pack for previewing a WordPress CRM import batch, binder or workspace tagging, and review-ready contact notes.

inputs.name: import_batch_name
inputs.description: Readable import batch label shown in notes and reports.

inputs.name: source_file_name
inputs.description: Original upload filename or intake source label.

inputs.name: target_workspace
inputs.description: Canonical workspace link added to imported records.

outputs.name: wordpress_import_preview
outputs.description: Dry-run preview of the local WordPress CRM import and note append operations.

outputs.name: contact_note_entries
outputs.description: Readable note lines that will be appended to matched or created contact records.
